title: VSE Gamepad
description: adds controller support to VS: Eureka ships.
body:
o) Use **[VSE Gamepad Lite](https://modrinth.com/mod/vse-gamepad-lite)** instead - better, more features & updated !



Now you can control your VS: Eureka ship with gamepad !

 

Mappings: 

                 : left joystick to ship movement 

                 : button A on xbox to ascend  / X on ps 

                 : button B on xbox to descend / O on ps

 

NOTE : it only adds control for ship if you want full player control with gamepad you can use any other gamepad mods, tested with https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controllable

 

my Discord for contact : mj_83_

 

Thanks to @BrickyBoy for fixing mixin, his Discord: brickyboy124
